about.title: About Finance ISL
about.subtitle: Your Trusted Source for Islamic Finance Knowledge
about.description: Finance ISL is a comprehensive educational platform dedicated to promoting understanding of Islamic finance, business ethics, and Sharia-compliant economic principles.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: To democratize access to Islamic finance education and empower individuals and organizations with knowledge of ethical, Sharia-compliant financial systems.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.content: To become the world's leading digital platform for Islamic finance education.
